name: Name
pendingVerificationDescWorker: Your Aadhaar verification is pending admin review. You can browse and explore jobs in the meantime, but you will only be able to apply once your account is verified.
rejectedVerificationDescWorker: Your identity verification was rejected or not completed. Please update your Aadhaar card details in Profile settings to submit again.
pendingVerificationDescEmployer: Your Aadhaar verification is pending admin review. You can explore the dashboard in the meantime, but you will only be able to post jobs once your account is verified.
rejectedVerificationDescEmployer: Your identity verification was rejected or not completed. Please update your Aadhaar card details in Profile settings to submit again.
postJobLockedDesc: Your profile is currently under review. Once the admin verifies your Aadhaar, you will be able to post jobs. Feel free to fill in the details, but posting is locked until verification.
postJobLockedRejectedDesc: Your identity verification was rejected or not completed. Please update your Aadhaar details in Profile settings to submit again.
quickOtpVerifyDesc: Log in securely using your mobile number and simple OTP.
createProfileVerifyDesc: Select your role, upload Aadhaar for security badge, and list details.
hireAndWorkDesc: Post helper needs or apply to local jobs. Connect on WhatsApp instantly.
heroTitle: Find Local Part-Time Workers & Jobs Nearby
heroSubtitle: The simplest way for shop owners, event organizers, and households to hire verified part-time helpers in their own locality.
employerBenefit4: Contact selected helpers directly via WhatsApp/Call.
employerBenefit5: Rate helpers to keep the community reliable.
workerBenefit1: Find daily/fixed packing, delivery, support jobs near you.
workerBenefit3: Earn direct UPI payments from trusted local businesses.
workerBenefit4: Build reviews score to get hired faster.
profileSetupDesc: Please complete the steps to activate your account
whoAreYou: Who are you? (Choose your profile type)
workerDesc: Apply for part-time local jobs, pick tasks, and get paid directly.
employerDesc: Post part-time manual tasks and hire verified helpers in your locality.
aadhaarVerifyRequired: Aadhaar Verification Required: To maintain community trust, prevent fraud, and build secure hiring, all users must submit their 12-digit Aadhaar Card details. Admin approves pending profile queues within 24 hours.
faceClearlyVisible: Your face must be clearly visible
availableDesc: 🟢 Available for work. Employers can select you.
noActiveJobsFound: No active jobs found in this area.
changeFilterDesc: Try changing your location filter above.
youHaventApplied: You haven't applied to any jobs yet.
noReviewsReceived: No reviews received yet. Completed jobs will show feedback here.
blockedNameWarning: 🔒 Blocked to prevent fraudulent identity changes.
bioPlaceholder: Tell others about your skills, schedule, or experience...
requestPhoneChangeDesc: To update your registered mobile number, submit a request for Admin review. After approval, verify with OTP.
testHelperOtp: 💡 Test Helper: OTP is simulated. Enter **123456** to complete verification.
youHaveBeenSelected: You have been selected! Contact the employer:
needHelpersDesc: Post AC services, shifting assistance, grocery loading, delivery drops, or event setup. Workers in your neighborhood will apply instantly.
noActivePostings: No active postings. Click 'Post a Job Requirement' above.

pleaseFillTitleDesc: Please fill in the title and description.
paymentPositiveAmount: Payment must be a positive amount.
pleaseSelectCityArea: Please select both city and area.
failedCreateJob: Failed to create job posting. Please try again.
postJobSubtitle: Specify task details, location, and payment to hire helpers
jobTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Packing Helper, AC Servicing Assistant
